name: Reflection
summary: Single agent generates, critiques itself, and refines — loops until satisfied.
about: One agent iterates through Generate → Critique → Refine up to 3 times. The critic explicitly says 'SATISFIED' when quality is good enough, ending the loop early. Demonstrates self-improvement without external feedback.

generator.description: Produces a response — uses previous refinement if available
generator.system: You are a Generator. Produce a clear, complete response to the prompt. If a previous draft is provided, use it as your starting point and improve it.

previous_draft.description: Previous refined draft (empty on first iteration)

critic.description: Evaluates quality — outputs SATISFIED or specific feedback
critic.system: You are a Critic. Evaluate the draft against the original prompt. If the draft is good enough, start your response with the word SATISFIED and briefly explain why. Otherwise list specific, actionable improvements needed.

refiner.description: Applies the critic's feedback to improve the draft
refiner.system: You are a Refiner. Improve the draft based on the critic's feedback. If the critic said SATISFIED, return the draft unchanged.
